name: Mendix
description: Mendix — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Low Code Platform.

seo.title: Mendix Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Mendix analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Mendix is a No-code / Low-code App Builders tool.
pros: Ships products faster without full engineering resources
cons: Customization ceiling limits complex business logic
